response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, including recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of GenAI-specific projects, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems—key technologies for this role. His experience in cloud platforms (AWS, via AWS CDK) and Python/TypeScript is relevant but not deeply demonstrated in AI contexts.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience with Python and TypeScript
Recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong background in cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and scalable systems
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures mentioned
Limited evidence of GenAI-specific production experience (e.g., LLM integration, evaluation pipelines)
No master's/PhD or clear expertise in LLM performance metrics or multi-agent systems
